channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — June 07, 2026
item.description: Ukrainian drone attacks target Russian territory deep within its borders, striking near St. Petersburg and oil depots. In the Persian Gulf, a fragile ceasefire between the United States and Iran is tested by a new exchange of strikes, raising concern...

item.title: The VENCAst — June 06, 2026
item.description: Reports allege covert Israeli military deployments in Azerbaijan, positioning units close to Iran for intelligence and drone operations. Meanwhile, Russian President Vladimir Putin has rejected Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy's recent offer f...

item.title: The VENCAst — June 05, 2026
item.description: Welcome to The VENCAst. I am your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, bringing you the essential global news update for Friday, June 05, 2026. Today, we delve into a series of critical developments across the globe. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Ze...
